issuesFound.fix: Line 2700: After `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-haspopup', 'listbox');` add `setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation toggle missing aria-expanded update on close
issuesFound.explanation: The mobileNav.close function hides the navigation drawer but does not set aria-expanded="false" on the trigger button. This leaves screen reader users unaware that the navigation has collapsed and that the associated content is no longer available.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2393: Insert `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');` immediately after the line `_open = false;` within the close function.

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu trigger missing aria-expanded update on open
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdownMenu._openInstance function reveals the dropdown panel by removing the hidden attribute and adding CSS classes, but it does not update the triggering button's aria-expanded attribute to "true", violating the ARIA disclosure pattern requirements.
issuesFound.fix: Line 2500: Insert `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');` immediately after the line `inst.open = true;` within the _openInstance function.

issuesFound.title: Pricing period buttons missing aria-pressed state
issuesFound.explanation: The pricing._syncToggleState function updates the visual appearance of the billing period buttons (monthly/quarterly/annual) by toggling CSS classes, but it does not set aria-pressed to indicate which button is currently selected, leaving screen reader users unaware of the active billing period.
issuesFound.fix: Line 3630: Inside the `_periodBtns.forEach` loop, after `const isActive = btnPeriod === period;`, add `setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));`

issuesFound.title: Dropdown menu triggers missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown menu controller opens and closes panels via _openInstance() and _closeInstance(), but these functions do not set aria-expanded="true" or "false" on the trigger elements. This prevents assistive technologies from announcing the expanded/collapsed state of the dropdowns.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 2274: Add setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, true); inside _openInstance after inst.open = true;
  Line 2293: Add setAttr(inst.trigger, ARIA.EXPANDED, false); inside _closeInstance after inst.open = false;

issuesFound.title: Product filtering results not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When filters are applied, the function updates the visible product cards and the count badge, but does not announce the results via a live region. Screen reader users are not informed how many products match the selected filters or that the content has changed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3508: After emit(_gridEl, 'filter:applied', ...);, add:
  Line 3509: liveRegion.announce(`${totalMatches} products found`);

issuesFound.title: Site search input missing initial aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The search input is configured as a combobox with role, aria-autocomplete, aria-controls, and aria-haspopup, but aria-expanded is not initialised to "false" when the page loads.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3260: After setAttr(input, 'aria-haspopup', 'listbox'); in suggestionListRenderer.mount, add:
  Line 3261: setAttr(input, ARIA.EXPANDED, false);

issuesFound.title: Pricing period changes not announced to screen readers
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period is toggled between monthly and annual, the price amounts update visually but no announcement is made to screen reader users. They cannot perceive that the prices have changed or what the new values are.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3680: After emit(document, 'pricing:periodchange', ...);, add:
  Line 3681: liveRegion.announce(`Prices switched to ${period} billing`);

issuesFound.title: Pricing period toggle buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The billing period toggle buttons (monthly/annual) act as two-state toggles but the _syncToggleState function only updates CSS classes. It does not set aria-pressed="true" on the active button or aria-pressed="false" on inactive buttons, so screen readers cannot identify which billing period is selected.

issuesFound.title: Mobile navigation state changes not announced
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer opens and closes without announcing its state change to screen readers. While focus management is also missing (see separate issue), the state change itself should be announced via a live region.

issuesFound.title: StarRating decorative stars not hidden from assistive technology
issuesFound.explanation: The individual star characters (★ and ☆) are rendered as text content without aria-hidden. issuesFound.title: Textarea component missing aria-invalid mapping
issuesFound.explanation: The Textarea component accepts an invalid prop to indicate error states but does not map it to aria-invalid on the underlying textarea element. Screen readers cannot programmatically identify when the field contains invalid data.
issuesFound.fix: Line 843: <textarea id={id} aria-invalid={invalid ? 'true' : undefined} className={['form-textarea', invalid ? 'form-textarea--error' : '', className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} {...rest} />
